meta.look: Dimensional depth — gradient-shaded platforms / cards convey the content relationship (layers / hierarchy / composition); it is NOT a deck-wide style lock. Recolor the two base hexes to the deck palette so the figure blends into any deck.
meta.usage: Use full-slide OR scale into an in-page region via the data-native-diagram placeholder (x/y/w/h). `density` says how small it can shrink and stay legible.
meta.select_by: content relationship (type/use) x item count (slots) x content-per-slot (holds); place full-slide or as a region within the density limit.
meta.license_note: Components shipped here are original CC0 assets, free to ship and reuse.

demo_synthetic_platform.pick: Pick for a 3-tier platform / tech-stack architecture: 3 stacked bands (application / capability / foundation), ~5 short capability cards per tier. Original CC0 demo asset — free to ship/reuse.
